task_completion.description: GIMP is open and displaying the initial white canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIMP 2.10 interface is visible with a blank white canvas (which may have a gray border) open in the main workspace.

task_completion.description: The Ellipse Select Tool (or equivalent circular drawing tool) is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ellipse Select Tool icon is highlighted/active in the GIMP toolbox.

task_completion.description: The active drawing color is set to red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The foreground color swatch in the GIMP toolbox shows a bright red color.

task_completion.description: A circular selection is created in the center of the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular or near-circular selection outline ('marching ants') is visible in the middle area of the canvas.

task_completion.description: The circular shape in the center of the image is filled with red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid red circle is visible in the center of the canvas, taking up a moderate portion (roughly 5% to 40%) of the image area.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIMP GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking tools, dragging selections, and using the GIMP interface, rather than typing image manipulation commands (like ImageMagick) in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent created the circle from scratch rather than opening a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots shows the blank canvas being actively modified, rather than a completed red circle image suddenly being opened from the file menu.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the Script-Fu or Python console to bypass manual drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GIMP scripting console is not open or used to programmatically generate the circle.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The environment is GIMP 2.10. The starting canvas is a 600x400 white image with a gray border. A successful execution must result in a red circle that meets these criteria: 1) Color is bright red (R>=200, G<=50, B<=50). 2) Size is between 5-40% of the image area. 3) Shape is reasonably circular (aspect ratio >= 0.7). 4) Positioned in the middle 60% of the image (x: 120-480, y: 80-320). The agent passes if the final visual state clearly shows this red circle drawn on the canvas.
